scripts.eval: node --import tsx src/cli/main.ts eval run --case typescript-negative --case model-refutation-control --case javascript-negative --case python-negative --case go-negative --case rust-negative --case java-negative
scripts.eval:with-env: node --env-file-if-exists=.env --import tsx src/cli/main.ts eval run --slice-root eval/fixtures/proof-quality-slices --review-mode pr --review-depth thorough --intent-planning model --judge-findings --semantic-judge --max-concurrent-tasks 1
scripts.eval:cheap:provider: node --env-file-if-exists=.env --import tsx src/cli/main.ts eval run --slice-root eval/fixtures/proof-quality-slices --review-mode pr --review-depth thorough --intent-planning model --judge-findings --semantic-judge --max-concurrent-tasks 1 --case semantic-authz-cross-file --case semantic-authz-defensive-control --case semantic-dayjs-slot-boundary --case semantic-go-cache-concurrency --case semantic-billing-discount-regression
scripts.eval:cheap: npm run eval:cheap:refutation && npm run eval:cheap:provider
scripts.eval:benchmark: node --import tsx scripts/hydrate-code-review-benchmark.ts --quiet && node --env-file-if-exists=.env --import tsx src/cli/main.ts eval run --slice-root .codereviewer/eval/benchmark-slices/code-review-bench-style --review-mode pr --review-depth thorough --intent-planning model --judge-findings --semantic-judge --max-concurrent-tasks 1
scripts.eval:benchmark:smoke: node --import tsx scripts/hydrate-code-review-benchmark.ts --quiet --case crb-cal-dot-com-06-advanced-date-override-handling-and-timezone-compatibility-improvement --case crb-grafana-10-unified-storage-performance-optimizations --case crb-cal-dot-com-02-feat-2fa-backup-codes && node --env-file-if-exists=.env --import tsx src/cli/main.ts eval run --slice-root .codereviewer/eval/benchmark-slices/code-review-bench-style --review-mode pr --review-depth thorough --intent-planning model --judge-findings --semantic-judge --max-concurrent-tasks 1 --case crb-cal-dot-com-06-advanced-date-override-handling-and-timezone-compatibility-improvement --case crb-grafana-10-unified-storage-performance-optimizations --case crb-cal-dot-com-02-feat-2fa-backup-codes
scripts.eval:benchmark:debug: node --import tsx scripts/hydrate-code-review-benchmark.ts --quiet && node --env-file-if-exists=.env --import tsx src/cli/main.ts eval run --slice-root .codereviewer/eval/benchmark-slices/code-review-bench-style --review-mode pr --review-depth thorough --intent-planning model --judge-findings --semantic-judge --max-concurrent-tasks 1 --debug --log-file .codereviewer/eval/log.log
scripts.eval:benchmark:agentic: node --import tsx scripts/hydrate-code-review-benchmark.ts --quiet && node --env-file-if-exists=.env --import tsx src/cli/main.ts eval run --slice-root .codereviewer/eval/benchmark-slices/code-review-bench-style --review-mode pr --review-depth thorough --intent-planning model --judge-findings --semantic-judge --max-concurrent-tasks 1 --debug --log-file .codereviewer/eval/log.log
scripts.eval:benchmark:baseline: node --import tsx scripts/hydrate-code-review-benchmark.ts --quiet && node --env-file-if-exists=.env --import tsx src/cli/main.ts eval run --slice-root .codereviewer/eval/benchmark-slices/code-review-bench-style --semantic-judge --max-concurrent-tasks 1
scripts.eval:benchmark:deterministic: node --import tsx scripts/hydrate-code-review-benchmark.ts --quiet && node --import tsx src/cli/main.ts eval run --slice-root .codereviewer/eval/benchmark-slices/code-review-bench-style
scripts.eval:slice-manifest: node --import tsx src/cli/main.ts eval slice-manifest --slice-root eval/fixtures/slices
scripts.eval:benchmark-manifest: node --import tsx scripts/hydrate-code-review-benchmark.ts --quiet && node --import tsx src/cli/main.ts eval slice-manifest --slice-root .codereviewer/eval/benchmark-slices/code-review-bench-style
